title: JDi Origins
description: A Collection Of Origins (2 Currently) Based Off Of Characters Made By NicholasJDi.
body:
# About
JDi Origins Is A Collection Of Origins Created With [The Origin Creator]([https://www.mathgeniuszach.com/apps/origin-creator)
## Notes
> This Mod Is In Beta Expect Changes!

> If you are interested in the project you can take a look at the [Blog](https://nicholasjdi.github.io/blogs/jdi-origins).
# Origins
> _As Of Latest Version_
## Spirit Fox
![A Extremaly Powerful Shy Fox Born Under The Moonlight Trapped Between The Material World And The Spirit Realm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NKd6Kd6e/images/27495ecf09b43ffcb80415bd578096f68939d304.png)
### Shy
Due To Being Part Spirit You Are Not Easily Noticed, So You Were Alone Most Of Your Life, Due To This You Are Extremely Shy And Subconsciously Phase More Into The Spiritual Realm When Near Others. (You Become Harder To See [50% Transparent])
### Silver Skin
As Being Stuck Between Relms Your Skin Is Very Slightly Tinted Silver
### Weak Body
Due To Being Part Spirit, Your Weaker In The Material World. (You Have 7 Hearts Of Health And Cannot Wear Armor)
### Sneaky
When Sneaking You Phase More Into The Spiritual Realm (You Become Harder To See [50% Transparent])
### Harder To Hit
Due To Being Part Spirit, You Are Harder To Hit (80% Damage Reduction)
### Light Body
Due To Being Part Spirit, You Can Survive Falling Greater Distances And Are Quick Footed
### Lunar Flight
Because You Were Born Under The Moon, During The Night You Can Glide Using The Moon's Power.
### Spiritual Storage
Due To Being Intertwined Between Worlds, You Can Store Things In the Spiritual Realm. (You Have Keep Inventory)
### Lunar Strength
Because You Were Born Under The Moon, During The Night You Can Hit Harder Using The Moon's Power. (You Hit 50% Harder)
### Lunar Healing
Because You Were Born Under The Moon, You Can Only Heal During The Night
### Spirit Sense
Due To Being A Spirit, You Can Sense Others. (All Entities Glow For You While Sneaking)
### Berry Loving Fox
Due To Being A Fox You Love Berries, So Eating Them Heals You
## Soul Mage
![A Powerfull Mage That Has Harnessed The Power Of The Soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NKd6Kd6e/images/a5963dac6dd84307e7e85c39fa53e64811285573.png)
### Soul Enter
You Can Enter The Soul Of Anyone
### Soul Sense
You Can Sense The Soul Of Players. (All Players Glow For You While Sneaking, Spirit Fox Is Excluded.)
## Planned Origins
> _May Change_
### Snow Wolf
### Stellar Fairy
# That's All For Now :D
